user.title: Set up Trend Predictor
user.description: Select a numeric entity. The sensor automatically detects whether the value is rising or falling and picks the appropriate target.

data_description.source_entity: Numeric sensor to analyse (e.g. battery state of charge)
data_description.min_value: Lower bound — targeted when the trend is falling (e.g. 0 for empty)
data_description.max_value: Upper bound — targeted when the trend is rising (e.g. 100 for full)
data_description.time_window: How many minutes of history to use for regression

error.already_configured: This entity is already being monitored

data_description.min_value: Lower bound — targeted when the trend is falling
data_description.max_value: Upper bound — targeted when the trend is rising
data_description.time_window: How many minutes of history to use for regression
